pg001_gp002_tx001: The month of Chithirai has been born.
pg001_gp002_tx002: The New Year has also come.
pg001_gp002_tx004: We will celebrate happily with the elders and the little ones too.
pg001_gp003_tx001: We will wake up early in the morning, leaving sleep.
pg001_gp003_tx002: We will bathe after keeping herbal bath water.
pg001_gp003_tx004: We will go to the temple.
pg001_im002: In the temple courtyard, mother, father, daughter and son wearing festival clothes are walking together; the pillars and the hanging lamp can also be seen.
pg002_gp001_tx001: Keeping a new pot, we will make pongal.
pg002_gp001_tx002: We will serve and eat murukku, vadai, modhagam, and bananas.
pg002_gp001_tx003: We will give to the neighbours too.
pg002_gp001_tx004: We will pay respects to elders.
pg002_gp002_tx001: In the evening, everyone will get together and play.
pg002_gp003_tx001: We will spend that day happily.
pg002_im002: Near the entrance of the house, mother is speaking lovingly with two children and receives the folded cloth bundle in the child’s hand.
gl001_def: A very early time in the morning; the time before/around the sun fully rises.
gl002_def: The next-door people living nearby / people in the vicinity.
gl004_def: Spending time or the day in a particular way.
gl005_def: Conducting a festival or special day happily.
gl006_def: A place where God is worshipped.
gl007_def: The month called ‘Chithirai’, which is one among the Tamil months.
gl008_def: The Tamil New Year celebration that comes in the month of Chithirai.
gl010_def: Bathing the body; having a bath.
gl011_def: Placing and offering food to others.
gl012_def: Clothes newly bought or worn new.
gl013_def: The day/period when a new year begins.
gl014_def: Older people by age; the elderly or seniors.
gl015_def: A traditional food made so that milk/rice boils in a pot and overflows.
gl016_def: A competitive programme to see who does best.
gl017_def: A snack made from flour and deep-fried in oil.
gl018_def: A type of sweet made with a sweet filling.
gl019_def: A round snack made with dhal/flour and deep-fried in oil.
gl020_def: Bowing respectfully to offer greetings; to worship.
gl021_def: A fruit that grows on the banana tree.
qz001_que: What do we call the Chithirai New Year?
qz001_o0_exp: ❌ This is a festival celebrated in the month of Thai; it is not another name for the Chithirai New Year.
qz001_o1_exp: ❌ This is the Festival of Lights; it does not refer to the Chithirai month New Year.
qz001_o2_exp: ✅ Correct! We call the Chithirai New Year “New Year”.
